array.string: ts=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ); wb_code=$(/usr/bin/curl -sS -m 5 -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' 'http://192.168.0.249:8080/settings/whitebalance?set=incandescent'); fm_code=$(/usr/bin/curl -sS -m 5 -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' 'http://192.168.0.249:8080/settings/focusmode?set=continuous-picture'); echo "$ts wb=$wb_code fm=$fm_code" >> /tmp/s7-settings-watchdog.log
